root_cause: The deployment script took longer than the allowed time limit to complete.
evidence_lines: deploy	step	2023-10-01T12:00:19Z WARNING: Deployment taking longer than expected.
deploy	step	2023-10-01T12:00:30Z ERROR: Deployment timed out after 30 seconds.
remediation_steps: Increase the deployment timeout limit in the GitHub Actions workflow.
Optimize the deployment script to reduce execution time.
